feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Is it possible that spread square frame of item of apps "Post General Entries" ?
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is it possible that spread square frame of item of apps "Post General Entries" ?

This is the red line in the image.

If it cannot be done without UI Adaptation support, how do I search for apps that UI Adaptation supports?

Best Regards,

Yuki Tsumura

entry.title: High CPU Utilization and latency in calls after changing the app to new Hana cloud DB
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

recently , we changed the SAP Hana Cloud for one of the CAP Service

we created new HDI Container and and Schema and unbinded the old HDI Container and binded for new HDI and Schema and Restarted the app and deployed the new Hana DB Artifacts to HDI

We are Experiencing High CPU Utilization , any suggestions and steps to be done for bringing CPU Utilization , its going around 80% some times leading to high latency in calls 

In our Solution we are replication tables from ECC System in HANA CLOUD and exposing them as capm service , CPU Utilization is more than 40% expected

entry.title: S4HPC Sending Mails Using SMTP CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE Email does not arrived
entry.content:
Hi.

My problem is the following. 

I am in S4HANA Public Cloud using Embedded Extensibility want to sent email with binary attachment. 

I do it along to the following documentation.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/8d1f989deca1455dabc3d81b433fbdaf.html

My code is below. 

    TRY.
        DATA(lo_mail) = cl_bcs_mail_message=>create_instance( ).
        lo_mail->set_sender( 'dummy1@sap.com' ).
        lo_mail->add_recipient( 'dummy2@sap.com' ).
        lo_mail->set_subject( 'Test Mail' ).
        lo_mail->set_main( cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_text_html( '<h1>Hello</h1><p>This is a test mail.</p>' ) ).
        lo_mail->add_attachment( cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_text_plain(
          iv_content      = 'This is a text attachment'
          iv_filename     = 'Text_Attachment.txt'
        ) ).
        lo_mail->add_attachment( cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_instance(
          iv_content      = '<note><to>John</to><from>Jane</from><body>My nice XML!</body></note>'
          iv_content_type = 'text/xml'
          iv_filename     = 'Text_Attachment.xml'
        ) ).

        DATA(lo_mail_status_monitor) = lo_mail->send( ).

        lo_mail_status_monitor->get_email_status(
          IMPORTING
            es_mail_status         = DATA(ls_mail_status)
            et_recipients_statuses = DATA(lt_recipients_statuses) ).

        "handle exceptions here
      CATCH cx_bcs_mail INTO DATA(lx_mail).
    ENDTRY.
    COMMIT WORK.

I receive successful email sending status.

Email Monitor says email is delivered.

But message does not arrive my mailbox. 

It looks everything is fine, but eventually it does not work 

Does anybody can support me here?

Thanks

Vitali

entry.title: How can we delete our global account?
entry.content:
Who is our SAP contact to assist with this request

S0018488361

Approach Solutions Pty Limited

sandy.eastman@approach-solutions.com

entry.title: S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition: Unable to see the Italy e-invoice xml file if payment method is blank
entry.content:
S4H Public cloud_Italy E-Invoice

System is not allowing to see the Italy e-invoice xml if payment method is not maintained. Can you please help us with your expertise what could be the possible ways to get the xml file without maintaining payment method in edocument cockpit.

entry.title: Query with SAP Note 3508244 - Incompatible Change in Data Lake SQL on Files Behavior in QRC 4/2024
entry.content:
As the Data lake Relational Engine native SQL on Files will be removed in QRC 4/2024, I was checking the SAP Note 3508244 - Incompatible Change in Data Lake SQL on Files Behavior in QRC 4/2024 

According to this Note, I created a Remote Source REMOTE_SOF and Virtual Table in SAP HANA Database using the below command 

CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE NATION(N_NATIONKEY INT, N_NAME VARCHAR(25), N_REGIONKEY INT, N_COMMENT VARCHAR(152)) AT REMOTE_SOF."/nation.csv" AS CSV FIELD DELIMITED BY ',';

The table was created successfully. However, when I try to execute the below select query

SELECT * FROM NATION;

The last entry in the nation.csv file is not getting displayed in the query output. Has anyone encountered a similar issue? If so, could anyone please provide guidance or kindly suggest a resolution?"

entry.title: How to get the API Key for S4 HANA Cloud trial (Not for the public sandbox).
entry.content:
Hey all, I've been struggling to find how to get the API key for my trial of S4 HANA Cloud.

I've only found how to retrieve the API Key that let's you hit this url: https://sandbox.api.sap.com
But where do I get the key for my S4 HANA Cloud trial instance that has a url of this style: https://myXXXXX.s4hana.ondemand.com/ ?

I'd appreciate a lot some help, also if you can mention how I'd get the API Key for a production environment as well, would be helpful in advance. Cheers.

entry.title: failover and plan cache
entry.content: If we are doing a failover of HANA from node a to node b and if node b is the new primary server in the HSR scenario, will this result in new PLAN_ID's getting generated and complete sql plan cache rebuilt. Just asking for guidance

entry.title: Tutorials for Creating a full stack CAP application using separate layers of UI5, node.js and HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for tutorials, where I can build separate modules for Node.Js, UI5 and HANA, and then connect them together to form a fully fledged application, based on a use case from one of the previous projects I was a small part of, so as to upskill myself and apply the knowledge in my future projects. 

However, I could not find any tutorials, for connecting separately created modules to this purpose. 

 

Could anyone please help me with the same, where I can find the relevant resources?

 

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: Is there any method can upload and post API bank statement to meet Japan local requirement?
entry.content:
I am facing a problem while implementing a project in Japan. To satisfy the customer's requirements, we need to upload the bank statement via an API form and post it. However, it seems that the standard S/4 HANA Cloud does not provide an API form for bank statement uploads.

Can anyone help me or provide instructions on how to handle this?

I would greatly appreciate your assistance.

entry.title: Reforma tributária Brasil - Atualizações ERP
entry.content:
Boa tarde, Pessoal.

Gostaria  de uma ajuda , sou novo por aqui, já existem alguns fóruns específicos, que estejam fazendo estudos sobre as mudanças de processos e sistema ERP para atender a reforma tributária na SAP?

Como faço para ser incluído neste fóruns?

entry.title: Error 403 when Create Sales Order using API_SALES_ORDER_SRV
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I need help. I face issues creating Sales Orders using API_SALES_ORDER_SRV from an External Application (in this case, Dynamics 365 Business Central).

I am trying to create a new sales order from an external application built in Microsoft Dynamics Business Central. I successfully retrieve sales order data using the GET method using the same service

endpoint (/A_SalesOrder). However, when I attempt to create a new sales order, I receive a "403 Forbidden" error message.

I have verified that the username and password for Basic Authorization are correct, and I have included the X-CSRF-Token in the header of my request. What confuses me is that I can successfully create a new sales order using Postman.

Could you help me understand why this might be happening?

Here is my payload to Create new Sales Order:

{
    "SalesOrderType": "OR",
    "SalesOrganization": "SBY", 
    "DistributionChannel": "SL", 
    "OrganizationDivision": "SL", 
    "PriceDetnExchangeRate": "1.00000",
    "SoldToParty": "1000347", 
    "TotalNetAmount": "500.00",
    "PurchaseOrderByCustomer": "Test SO (Integration)",
    "TransactionCurrency": "USD", 
    "IncotermsClassification": "EXW", 
    "IncotermsTransferLocation": "Palo Alto", 
    "CustomerAccountAssignmentGroup": "01",
    "CustomerGroup": "01",
    "CustomerPaymentTerms": "0004", 
    "to_Item": {
        "results": [
            {
                "SalesOrderItem": "10",
                "SalesOrderItemCategory": "TAN",
                "SalesOrderItemText": "Barang Ariel",
                "PurchaseOrderByCustomer": "Test so",
                "Material": "CAU0099",
                "RequestedQuantity": "20",
                "RequestedQuantityUnit": "PC",
                "ConfdDelivQtyInOrderQtyUnit": "2",
                "NetAmount": "500.00",
                "MaterialGroup": "L004",
                "ProductionPlant": "GON",
                "StorageLocation": "GON1",
                "ShippingPoint": "GOSP",
                "DeliveryPriority": "1",
                "DeliveryDateQuantityIsFixed": false,
                "IncotermsClassification": "EXW",
                "IncotermsTransferLocation": "Palo Alto",
                "IncotermsLocation1": "Palo Alto",
                "MatlAccountAssignmentGroup": "03",
                "CustomerPaymentTerms": "0004",
                "CustomerGroup": "01",
                "ProfitCenter": "MJK",
                "Subtotal1Amount": "500.00",
                "Subtotal2Amount": "500.00",
                "Subtotal3Amount": "500.00",
                "to_PricingElement": {
                    "results": [
                        {
                            "ConditionType": "PPR0",
                            "ConditionRateValue": "500.00",
                            "ConditionCurrency": "USD",
                            "ConditionQuantity": "20",
                            "ConditionQuantityUnit": "PC"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            }
        ]
    }
}

Here is my request using Postman

entry.title: How to Bind Applications to Pre-Existing Schemas in HANA Cloud (BTP Cloud Foundry)?
entry.content:
I recently migrated a HANA Service DB (BTP Neo) to HANA Cloud in BTP Cloud Foundry. In this setup, several schemas were created in the HANA Cloud database using a technical user.

Now, we have applications deployed in Cloud Foundry that need to access these schemas. I want to create service bindings between these applications and the pre-existing schemas in HANA Cloud.

Is it possible to create a service instance of type hana with the schema plan for an already existing schema? how can it be achieved?

If not, what would be the recommended approach to bind applications to pre-existing schemas?

entry.title: SAP HANA : Cannot create Instance
entry.content:
Hi, I am trying to install SAP HANA using the MS Azure VM (open suse 15 )
But not able to install
I am getting below error

 


Installing components...
Configuring SAP HANA Database...
Configuring System...
Configuring instance...
Resume of SAP HANA Express Edition Installation failed
Installation of SAP HANA Database failed
Installation failed
error installing

SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud  SAP HANA Cloud

entry.title: Not able to access Table created in SAP HANA Cloud with Datasphere Replication
entry.content:
Hi team,

We are following a scenario for replicating data from Datasphere to SAP HANA Cloud

Created a Replication scenario in Datasphere for a table "KNA1" . This table is visible in our  container schema after replication as below . There are other tables also created in this container schema through CAPM entity creation.

The below table has no name space attached as it is directly created from Replication

Created a hdb procedure in db/src folder of our CAPM project that access the tables from both CAPM created tables and table created with Data sphere Replication .

but while accessing the tables created through Replication we are getting an issue while deploying .

The file requires "db://KNA1" which is not provided by any file [8212001] (STDERR, APP/TASK/deploy)#
Other tables which are created with CAPM framework has no issue when accessed with procedures but only tables created with a Replication scenario of Datasphere in our schema has the issue.
 
Please let us know if we have missed any thing while accessing these tables.
 
Regards
Prasad

entry.title: Issue in fragment/Adobe form in S4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP community,

I have created copy of PO form to design custom form in S4 HANA Public cloud Environment. In Dev system Form is working as expected. But when It moved to Test system, the logic written inside the Adobe form is not working. 


if someone has faced has same issue or know the route cause , please help us on this.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Hi sara ,May i know how you resolved the issue
Issue with Error Message Display in RAP Managed Scenario with Unmanaged Save
entry.content: I am working with a managed scenario using an unmanaged save (Late Numbering) and employing BAPI to update data. However, I am facing an issue where error messages do not appear in the event of a failure. Success, information, and warning messages display correctly when there is no error in LT_BAPIRETURN. However, if there is an error message, nothing is shown, and the screen remains unchanged. This issue was working as expected in my development system but is not functioning correctly in other systems. I have attached an image for reference. I also tried passing %pid, but that didn’t resolve the problem.

entry.title: Add mappings is not working in SAP HANA Cloud Instance
entry.content:
Hi,
From the past 1 week, i am getting an error while adding the mappings. But, earlier it was working.
I am only able to map the cloud foundry environment that too while creating the HANA Cloud Instance.
After the creation of HANA Cloud Instance, if i try to map any environment whether Kyma or Cloud Foundry or both, it is showing the below error.
I have created the Hana Cloud Database Instance from Hana Cloud tools and i am working on trial account.

Version
2024.40.8 (QRC 4/2024)
Runtime Environment
Other Environments

Please help me to resolve this issue.

Best Regards,
Abhinav

entry.title: Error While running F.01 "please input Valid company code and Profit Center"
entry.content:
Hi Friends, 

We are in S4HANA. While running F.01 i am getting the error "please input Valid company code and Profit Center", not sure what is the issue. 

No profit center is given as input parameter. 

Input parameters given are Chart of Comp Code, Company code and FSV version and periods for whcih reprot is required. Any help. 

 

Regards,

Venu
